description: A proprietary model by Symphony Talent to assess and measure workplace motivators. KILOS underpins questions and exercises in all research activities — from focus groups and surveys to leadership interviews and competitor audits. It helps discover the nuances of desires that create a differentiated and far more emotional reason to work for an organization beyond pay.
survey_question: Q15 — Which of the following factors would you say are the most rewarding aspects – the 'high points' – of working for your current employer? (Select up to FIVE factors)

pillars.name: Kinship
pillars.description: Culture, community, DEI, psychological safety, wellbeing

factors.name: Diverse and Inclusive
factors.description: People here act in a way that's understanding, welcoming and inclusive of all diversity
survey_labels: A diverse and inclusive working environment

factors.name: Wellbeing
factors.description: This company recognizes people as individuals and understands that we are human first, employees second

factors.name: Safe to Voice Opinions
factors.description: People here can disagree openly or share an alternate viewpoint without personal repercussions

factors.name: Fairness and Respect
factors.description: People here are regularly seen to treat each other fairly and/or with respect, no matter their seniority

factors.name: Sense of Belonging
factors.description: People here share a connection that goes deeper than colleagues, based on personal values/interests

factors.name: Meaningful Work for People
factors.description: People working here make a noticeable impact on the people and communities they serve
survey_labels: The organisation's purpose or mission – the 'why' they do what they do
A focus on the wellbeing (financial/health etc) of customers
Being able to contribute to/have an impact on patient wellbeing

factors.name: Meaningful Work for the Planet
factors.description: People here are dedicated to positively changing our impact on the environment and the planet
survey_labels: Being able to contribute to/have an impact on the world/society

factors.name: Empowerment / Autonomy
factors.description: People here are given the freedom to choose how they do their work
survey_labels: A lack of bureaucracy and company politics
Being given the responsibility and resources to do a good job

factors.name: Influence Strategy
factors.description: People working here are given opportunities to influence the direction of the business strategy
survey_labels: Being able to contribute to/have an impact on the business

factors.name: Impact on a Big Scale
factors.description: People here are solving some of societies' big problems or working on large-scale projects

factors.name: Innovation and Invention
factors.description: People here can define a vision for the future and invent, innovate and/or take risks to achieve it

pillars.name: Lifestyle
pillars.description: Job security, benefits, work-life balance, flexibility, tools

factors.name: Good Benefits
factors.description: This company offers great benefits like retirement plans, healthcare and share options
survey_labels: Other benefits such as pensions, healthcare, gyms etc.

factors.name: Work Environment
factors.description: This company offers a clean, safe or attractive working environment

factors.name: Policies
factors.description: This company's policies are modern, innovative or relevant to people's needs (e.g. parental leave, vacation, wellbeing)

factors.name: Flexibility (Hours)
factors.description: This company offers people the freedom to choose when they work
survey_labels: Flexibility of working environment (hours, remote working etc)

factors.name: Flexibility (Location)
factors.description: This company offers people the freedom to choose where they work (remote/hybrid/office)
survey_labels: Flexibility of working environment (hours, remote working etc)

factors.name: Balance
factors.description: This company encourages people to maintain a great work life balance for better mental and physical wellbeing

factors.name: Stability
factors.description: This company has a stable market position which makes employees feel financially secure
survey_labels: Security of work and stability of the company

factors.name: Skills Attainment
factors.description: People here are given the opportunity to learn new skills or abilities, and gain knowledge

factors.name: Professional Expertise
factors.description: People here are encouraged to deepen and grow their professional skills, knowledge, expertise and abilities in order to specialize or gain a qualification

factors.name: Challenge and Stretch
factors.description: This company challenges people here to expand their remit and/or responsibilities

factors.name: Career Mobility
factors.description: People here can easily move function, job role and country or try new experiences
survey_labels: Ability to move role or country within the company

factors.name: Task Variety
factors.description: People here can work on a variety of tasks and projects, where often no two days are the same

factors.name: Career Progression
factors.description: People here can clearly see how to progress to a more senior or leadership position

pillars.name: Status
pillars.description: Heritage, ethics, reputation, commercial success, recognition

factors.name: Brand Name Recognition
factors.description: This company has a well-known brand name that impresses other people
survey_labels: Reputation of the company's brand(s), products or services

factors.name: Industry Reputation
factors.description: This company has a strong industry reputation for excellence, innovation or success
survey_labels: Their social, environmental and community actions

factors.name: Tools and Technologies
factors.description: This company offers work with cutting edge tools, resources and technologies

factors.name: Market Position
factors.description: This company holds a market-leading position
survey_labels: The company's financial performance (recent or historical) or market position

factors.name: Professional Reputation
factors.description: This company rewards and recognizes excellence in ways that enhance an individual's reputation in the workplace or industry
